column1: # Hand-curated structural overrides for Local Group objects whose LVDB
# summary row is too coarse for meaningful 3D rendering. Each row
# *replaces* the structural detail (axes + orientation) derived from
# LVDB for the named object; position (RA/Dec/distance) still flows
# from LVDB. Other objects render from LVDB's rhalf_physical /
# ellipticity / position_angle as a sky-plane oblate ellipsoid.
# Columns:
#   name              — display name (must match LVDB's `name` column for merge)
#   a_pc, b_pc, c_pc  — local-frame semi-axes in parsecs
#   orient            — orientation of the local frame in ICRS:
#                         disc:i=X,pa=Y   disc plane normal at inclination i
#                                         (degrees, 0=face-on), with line of
#                                         nodes at PA Y east of north. a, b
#                                         lie in the disc plane; c along the
#                                         disc normal.
#                         pa:X            long axis (a) in sky plane at PA X
#                                         east of north; b in sky plane
#                                         perpendicular; c along line of
#                                         sight to/from Sol.
#                         los             c-axis along line of sight from
#                                         Sol; a, b perpendicular (in the
#                                         transverse plane, galactic-aligned
#                                         choice for the basis seed).
#   ref_doi            — primary structural reference (DOI without resolver
#                        prefix).
# Per stellata-data-fidelity-principle: hand-curated overrides are
# acceptable only for truly singular edge cases where no canonical source
# resolves them. LVDB's projected (rhalf, ellipticity, PA) captures the
# typical dSph adequately; the three objects below have well-studied
# departures (LMC's inclined disc; SMC's line-of-sight elongation; Sgr's
# 3D extent through tidal disruption) that warrant per-object detail.
# Label visibility is governed at runtime by apparent-size ranking
# (local-group.ts → computeVisibleLabels) — no per-object threshold
# column. The MW-inside guard is the only exception, and it applies
# globally rather than per-object.
name
LMC
SMC
Sagittarius
